# spawnly_agent_templates (Data Source)

The catalog of spawnable agent type names registered in the Spawnly registry.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `agent_types` (List of String) Names of the **active** (spawnable) agent types. The registry excludes disabled templates from this list, so it is a catalog view rather than a full inventory.
